name: MLASTG Coverage Map v0.1
description: MITRE ATLAS technique coverage by the MLSec Application Security Testing Guide (MLASTG). Technique IDs and names reconciled against the official MITRE ATLAS data (mitre-atlas/atlas-data). Green = Full coverage (MLASVS controls + MLASTG tests), Yellow = Partial (some controls mapped). Import into the MITRE ATLAS Navigator at https://mitre-atlas.github.io/atlas-navigator/
